subject: Urgent: Setup for [Real Vendor Name] Invoice Finalization - Project Alpha
body:
Mark,

Are you at your desk?

I\u20ac\u2122m in the middle of a confidential board meeting regarding the final phase of Project Alpha, so I can't take any calls right now. We need to push through a rush payment to [Real Vendor Name] to ensure they meet Friday's deployment deadline.

Because of the urgency, they\u20ac\u2122ve provided updated remittance details for this specific milestone to bypass their usual domestic banking delays.

Please see the payment structure below and let me know as soon as you are ready to process the wire transfer. I need this handled within the next hour so we don't breach the contract terms. I will sign off on the internal compliance paperwork as soon as my meeting wraps up at 3:00 PM.

New Remittance Details:

Bank Name: Capital Commerce Bank

Routing Number: XXXXX0123

Account Number: XXXXX9876

Amount: $42,500.00

Send me the transaction confirmation number via email once it\u20ac\u2122s executed.

Thanks,

Jane
CFO,Novaco
